# ACM @ UIUC Core API

The ACM @ UIUC Core API provides services for managing chapter operations.

Others may call the API with an API key; please contact us to obtain one.

This API also integrates into the ACM website and other suborganization to provide calendar services.

Calendar clients call the iCal endpoints (available through ical.acm.illinois.edu) for calendar services.

## Usage

LLM-friendly API documentation (written in Markdown) can be found at /docs/index.md.

OpenAPI specifications for this API can be found at /docs/openapi.json and /docs/openapi.yaml
